summary: Cloudz Rewards UI testing PASSED. All 4 sections (Balance Panel, Ways to Earn, Ways to Redeem, Your Activity) are correctly rendered. Admin user (jkaatz@gmail.com) shows 30,000 Cloudz balance with 'All reward tiers unlocked' text. All 5 tier cards display correctly with $5/$30/$75/$175/$300 rewards. Redeem buttons are visible on unlocked tiers. Activity section shows ledger entries with +/- amounts.
critical_code_review_comments: Code PASSED: cloudz.tsx correctly uses API_URL from env for all API calls (lines 80-82)
Code PASSED: data-testid attributes properly added for testing (balance-card, earn-action-*, tier-card-*, redeem-btn-*, activity-entry-*)
Code PASSED: View All button correctly conditional on ledger.length > 5 (line 302)
Code PASSED: Proper loading state with ActivityIndicator (lines 135-142)
Code PASSED: Error handling for API failures with console.error (line 88)
seed_data_creation: None needed - existing admin user data used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloudz Rewards page at /cloudz requires navigation through Account menu (Account > Cloudz Rewards) to preserve auth session. Direct URL navigation via page.goto() causes session loss and 401 errors. Admin user jkaatz@gmail.com has 30,000 Cloudz points, which unlocks all 5 tiers. The View All button in Activity section only appears when ledger has >5 entries.

tested_flows.status: PASSED - All elements visible and correct

steps: Check 3 active cards (Place an Order, Signup Bonus, Refer a Friend)
tested_flows.status: PASSED - All 6 cards correctly rendered with labels and descriptions

steps: Check tier names and reward amounts
Verify Redeem buttons on unlocked tiers
